case_title: LINDA OWYEUNG VS. XUE HONG XIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT XUE HONG XIE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XIE, XUE HONG PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE ANY WRONGFUL ACTIONS AS A NOTARY WHICH CAUSED DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED OCT-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, XUE HONG
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY OWYEUNG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, XUE HONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
